content.body:
Extracts decisions (## Decision headings, inline Decision: markers),
patterns (## Pattern headings, inline Pattern: markers), and URL facts
from .md/.mdx/.txt/.rst files. All drafts carry INFERRED confidence
and full provenance metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
